name: modular-pixel-character-factory
_comment: Top-level knobs for the factory. mode=redraw paints every gear-equipped variant as its own sprite (default, works today). mode=rig is the future amortized path: paint each layer once, then re-pose the SAME layer art with the skeleton (TODO).
rig_mode_todo: Persist each painted layer (body part + gear) as a neutral-pose sprite keyed by skeleton bind pose.
Re-pose layers by warping/redrawing against target pose joints instead of re-prompting PixelLab per frame.
Fall back to redraw mode when a layer cannot be rigged cleanly.
